text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 146 

GAP_MO_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3-months) on this tier, using a mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the 
Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_MO_COINS_OS 

TYPE: NUM
